50px !important;margin-bottom: 15px !important;}"]

Hi, I’m Suli Breaks.

For years, I’ve been using words, stories, and performance to spark change, challenge thinking, and leave audiences thinking differently long after they’ve left the room. Whether it’s a live performance, a keynote, or an interactive workshop, my goal is simple: to move hearts, provoke minds, and inspire action. I don’t just aim for applause, I aim for impact. I’ve shared stages with students, educators, and corporate teams across the globe, tailoring every talk to the audience in front of me. Every story I tell, every insight I share, is designed to connect, resonate, and leave a lasting impression. If you’re looking for more than just inspiration, something that challenges, motivates, and stays with people, let’s make it happen.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner Heres 5 reasons to book

[/nectar_highlighted_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner column_padding="no-extra-padding" column_padding_tablet="inherit" column_padding_phone="inherit" column_padding_position="all" column_element_direction_desktop="default" column_element_spacing="default" desktop_text_alignment="default" tablet_text_alignment="default" phone_text_alignment="default" background_color_opacity="1" background_hover_color_opacity="1" column_backdrop_filter="none" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" overflow="visible" gradient_direction="left_to_right" overlay_strength="0.3" width="1/2" tablet_width_inherit="default" animation_type="default" bg_image_animation="none" border_type="simple" column_border_width="none" column_border_style="solid"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][nectar_icon_list animate="true" color="default" direction="horizontal" columns="3" icon_size="small" icon_style="border"][nectar_icon_list_item icon_type="numerical" text_full_html="simple" title="List Item" id="1767929281611-10" header="A Voice That Resonates Globally" text="Suli Breaks is one of the world’s most influential spoken word poets and storytellers. His work including the viral phenomenon “Why I Hate School But Love Education” has reached millions around the world and sparked real conversations about education, purpose and potential." tab_id="1767929281611-7"][/nectar_icon_list_item][nectar_icon_list_item icon_type="numerical" text_full_html="simple" title="List Item" id="1767929281619-4" header="Transformative Storytelling" text="Suli doesn’t just speak, he performs. Using the power of poetic verse and narrative, he connects emotionally with audiences, delivering insights that stick long after the event ends. His ability to weave art, truth and inspiration makes every talk a meaningful experience." tab_id="1767929281619-7"][/nectar_icon_list_item][nectar_icon_list_item icon_type="numerical" text_full_html="simple" title="List Item" id="1767929281627-0" header="Insightful, Purpose-Driven Perspectives" text="With a voice shaped by lived experience and cultural insight, Suli champions self-discovery, critical thinking, social change, and authentic living. His work ignites reflection and empowers audiences to rethink norms and unlock their own potential." tab_id="1767929281627-4"][/nectar_icon_list_item][nectar_icon_list_item icon_type="numerical" text_full_html="simple" title="List Item" id="1767929281634-6" header="Experience on Prestigious Stages" text="Suli has captivated audiences across the globe, from TEDx stages to international keynotes. His work has been featured at the United Nations Commonwealth Day and in front of diverse audiences beyond traditional poetry spaces, proving his universal appeal." tab_id="1767929281635-6"][/nectar_icon_list_item][nectar_icon_list_item icon_type="numerical" text_full_html="simple" title="List Item" id="1767929281643-5" header="Creative Storytelling for Brands & Organisations" text="Beyond performance, Suli collaborates with brands and institutions to craft poetic narratives and creative content that elevate message and mission. His unique approach brings new life to organisational storytelling and audience engagement." tab_id="1767929281643-2"][/nectar_icon_list_item][/nectar_icon_list][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row image="778" star_rating="none" title="Testimonial" id="1767929281689-10" tab_id="1767929281689-7" name="BT Openreach" quote="Suli’s powerful, thought-provoking performance left a lasting impression. Through his unique blend of poetry and storytelling, he captivated the audience, sparking meaningful conversations around identity, resilience, and empowerment. What stood out most was his deep engagement with the audience, as he shed light on the challenges faced by ethnic minority communities in today’s world. The feedback from our colleagues has been overwhelmingly positive, and I highly recommend Suli to anyone looking for a speaker who can inspire, challenge, and uplift. His performance wasn’t just an event, it"][testimonial image="788" star_rating="none" title="Testimonial" id="1767929281700-7" tab_id="1767929281701-10" name="LinkedIn" quote="Suli Breaks delivered a truly unforgettable keynote that reframed how we think about creativity in the workplace. With poetic precision and heartfelt clarity, he reminded us that creativity thrives on connection and platforms like LinkedIn are where those sparks begin. His words resonated across every department, leaving our team inspired to see the dots between disciplines, experiences, and people. A powerful, timely message masterfully delivered."][testimonial image="787" star_rating="none" title="Testimonial" id="1767929281705-2" tab_id="1767929281705-4" name="Lloyds Banking Group" quote="Suli’s performance was nothing short of electrifying. His words didn’t just echo through the room, they stirred hearts, sparked reflection, and set the tone for an evening rooted in pride, power, and purpose. He captured the spirit of the celebration with such authenticity and brilliance, leaving a lasting imprint on everyone present."][testimonial image="791" star_rating="none" title="Testimonial" id="1767929281709-10" tab_id="1767929281709-9" name="Thrive Network" quote="The impact of his performance extended beyond the stage. It set the tone for a vibrant cultural exchange lunch that brought together our London office in celebration of both Black History Month and Diwali. The room buzzed with conversation as colleagues connected over shared dishes, exchanged recipes, and reflected on the themes Suli so eloquently brought to life. It was a memorable afternoon that highlighted the richness of our diversity and the strength of our GSMA community. Suli’s presence and message were a powerful reminder of why representation truly matters, and how culture and connection can bring us closer together."][testimonial image="805" star_rating="none" title="Testimonial" id="1767929281717-8" tab_id="1767929281717-1" name="Matt Griffiths" subtitle="Chief Executive: Youth Music" quote="Another one here - Suli Breaks brought something truly unforgettable to Youth Music: Uncovered. His spoken word piece, “What Does Music Mean To You?”, captured the heart and soul of the evening—blending humour, honesty, and deep emotional resonance in a way that connected with every person in the room. The room was completely captivated, and we received incredible feedback from our guests. Suli’s words lingered long after the last note - reminding us that when words fail, there’s always a play button to press. We are so grateful to him for sharing his talent and creativity with us."][/testimonial_slider][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row type="full_width_background" full_screen_row_position="middle" Virtual Events

Suli Breaks brings the energy, insight, and impact of his live performances and keynotes to audiences around the world all from the comfort of their own screens. Through virtual events, he delivers powerful storytelling, thought-provoking messages, and interactive sessions designed to engage, motivate, and leave a lasting impression.
